jobDescription: Hello there, we’re Alan. We are revolutionizing the health insurance space in France, making it simple. We are obsessed with simplicity: no paperwork, no hassle, no intermediaries. We are building the best user experience in the complex field of healthcare. We want to improve the way people interact with the healthcare system by providing the right tools. In our engineering team, we do that by building an infrastructure, interfaces, and applications that simplify health insurance for all. For our users, health professionals, and even ourselves! Being an engineer at Alan means joining a small team of talented and passionate engineers, with a lot of product interaction. We move fast, with a lot of autonomy, and an important influence on product decisions. Our process is very simple: those who make product decisions are the same ones who build them. We are proud to tackle big challenges. An engineer would be a good fit at Alan if they were: - Self-starting and entrepreneurial - Passionate about building products and taking on big challenges - An expert in Python, Javascript, or another language, and willing to work in Python/ Java Script- Enthusiastic about teamwork, learning and teaching - An excellent engineer, who is still driven to grow - At ease with ambiguity It’s even better if you have built something from scratch. Everything else is bonus. We prefer to have diversity in experiences and backgrounds. We offer one of the best compensation packages in France, along with meaningful equity, an awesome office in the center of Paris, and a lot of other stuff. Compensation€45 K – €110 K 0.1% – 0.6% Visa Sponsorship Available
